## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] `go build ./...` succeeds
- [ ] New automation is a loop/tool, not hardcoded
- [ ] Consequential actions still go through the approval flow
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real message content added
